response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and databases, aligning with core requirements, but his seniority level (Staff/Senior roles for over a decade) vastly exceeds the entry-level job description, raising concerns about fit, retention, and salary expectations, while his German language proficiency is only basic despite high on-site requirements in Berlin.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and React experience across multiple production systems
Proven fullstack ownership from API to UI with clean architecture focus
Active open-source contributions and deep devops/tooling familiarity
concerns: Overqualified with 10+ years of senior/staff experience for an entry-level role
Basic German proficiency may hinder on-site collaboration in Berlin
Likely to be underutilized or leave quickly due to misaligned seniority
